name: lighthouse-keeper-dusk
description: Fixed-subject spectator world: an old lighthouse keeper at the edge of a sea cliff at dusk. The keeper is the anchor; camera controls orbit and dolly around him. He never walks; the world moves around a still man.
base: An old lighthouse keeper stands motionless at the very edge of a sea cliff at dusk. He is in his seventies, weather-beaten face, white beard, dark navy wool peacoat with the collar turned up, a flat wool cap, one hand gripping an unlit brass lantern at his side. Behind him and slightly to the right, a white stone lighthouse with a red-capped gallery rises from the headland, its lamp just beginning to rotate, throwing a slow pale beam through the thickening dusk. Below the cliff, dark slate-blue ocean swells roll in and burst against black rocks, sending up spray. The sky is a dusk gradient: deep indigo overhead fading through violet to a band of burnt orange and amber on the horizon where the sun has just set. A few gulls drift on the wind. Long grass and thrift flowers at the cliff edge ripple in a steady onshore wind that tugs at the keeper's coat and beard. Cinematic wide shot, volumetric haze in the lighthouse beam, soft film grain, moody naturalistic color grade. The camera hangs in the air at the keeper's eye level; the keeper stays planted at the cliff edge, only shifting his weight, breathing, and slowly turning his head to watch the sea.

anchors.subject: the old lighthouse keeper, planted at the cliff edge, never walking, never leaving frame
landmarks: the white lighthouse behind him to his right
the burnt-orange horizon band where the sun set
the black wave-battered rocks at the cliff base
anchors.lighting: post-sunset dusk: indigo-to-amber sky gradient, cool ambient light on faces and stone, warm rim light from the horizon side, periodic pale sweep from the rotating lighthouse lamp

idle: Nothing is held. The camera holds its current position, drifting almost imperceptibly. The keeper breathes, his coat and beard move in the wind, grass ripples, waves keep rolling in below, the lighthouse beam sweeps past on its slow rotation, gulls wheel in the distance. Dusk light and horizon glow stay exactly as they are.

A.label: orbit left
A.prompt: The camera orbits smoothly counterclockwise around the lighthouse keeper at a constant radius and constant eye-level height, keeping him centered in frame. As the camera circles, the background rotates behind him: the burnt-orange horizon, the darkening sea, and the white lighthouse slide across the frame in correct spatial order while the keeper stays fixed at the cliff edge. Dusk lighting on his face changes plausibly with the new angle: rim-lit when the horizon is behind him, softly front-lit when the camera is on the seaward side.

D.label: orbit right
D.prompt: The camera orbits smoothly clockwise around the lighthouse keeper at a constant radius and constant eye-level height, keeping him centered in frame. The background counter-rotates behind him: lighthouse, headland, open sea, and glowing horizon pass through frame in consistent order while the keeper remains planted at the cliff edge. His silhouette and the wind in his coat stay continuous; dusk sky gradient and horizon glow remain consistent from every angle.

W.label: dolly in
W.prompt: The camera pushes slowly straight in toward the lighthouse keeper, tightening from a wide shot toward a chest-up close shot. Detail resolves as it approaches: the weave of his wool coat, salt-and-wind texture in his white beard, deep creases around his eyes catching the last amber horizon light, the brass lantern at his side. He does not react to the camera; he keeps watching the sea. Background compresses gently, cliff edge and horizon stay level.

S.label: dolly out
S.prompt: The camera pulls slowly straight back away from the lighthouse keeper, widening the shot. More of the scene enters frame: the full lighthouse behind him, the sweep of the cliff line, whitecaps on the darkening sea below, the vast dusk sky with its indigo-to-amber gradient. The keeper becomes a small resolute figure against the glowing horizon, still planted at the cliff edge.

Q.label: crane up
Q.prompt: The camera rises smoothly on a vertical crane while gently tilting down to keep the lighthouse keeper in frame. As it climbs, the view opens up: the top of the cliff, the drop to the black rocks and breaking surf below him, the lighthouse gallery coming level with the lens, its rotating beam passing close by as a bright volumetric shaft in the dusk haze.

E.label: crane down
E.prompt: The camera descends smoothly toward grass level while tilting up slightly, ending in a low-angle hero shot of the lighthouse keeper. Windblown grass and thrift flowers cross the foreground in soft focus; the keeper towers against the indigo-and-amber dusk sky, the lighthouse beam sweeping far above his head.

list.name: light_the_lantern
list.prompt: The keeper lifts the brass lantern, opens its glass door, and lights it. A small warm orange flame catches, and a soft warm pool of light blooms across his hands, beard, and the near side of his coat, mixing with the cool dusk ambience. He lowers the lit lantern to his side and it keeps glowing from now on.

list.name: beam_sweep
list.prompt: The rotating lighthouse beam sweeps directly across the scene: a bright volumetric blade of pale light rakes over the grass, flares briefly across the keeper and the camera, and passes on out over the dark sea, leaving the dusk ambience unchanged.

list.name: big_wave
list.prompt: A larger-than-usual swell slams into the rocks at the base of the cliff; a tall burst of white spray leaps up past the cliff edge, hangs backlit against the orange horizon, and drifts as fine mist. The keeper glances down at it, then returns his gaze to the horizon.

list.name: gull_flyby
list.prompt: A seagull swoops close through frame between the camera and the keeper, banking on the wind with a single cry before gliding out over the sea. The keeper's eyes track it briefly.

negatives: no sudden day-night jumps, no sun visible above the horizon, no extra people, the keeper never walks or leaves the cliff edge, no camera teleports or cuts, horizon stays level, lighthouse stays in the same place on the headland

composePrompt.notes: Exactly one hold prompt is active at a time; on key release fall back to idle. Persistent events (light_the_lantern) append a short state line to the base for all subsequent frames: 'The keeper's brass lantern is lit, casting a warm orange glow on his hands and coat.' Non-persistent events are appended only for their duration.
